productDisplayName: Puma Men's Manilla Hi White Shoe
description: The Manilla is a high street fashion footwear from puma. The high ankle support sits snug, supporting the lower leg, while the contrast lining provide a robust style statement.Upper Crinkled leather upper for style and comfort Suede overlay on the ankle Central  lacing for a snug, customised Fit Perforated formstripe detail Midsole Innovative puma midsole in a combination of phylon and EVA that provides better cushioning and reduces weight Outsole Textured durable rubber outsole for great grip and traction
